[[File:Attention and Data to Alo.svg|thumb]]
[[Category:Church of Evolution]]
[[sn:Eye to Eye doctrine]][[Category:Grand Strategy]]
The Eye to Eye doctrine is a strategic doctrine (not religious doctrine) used by the [[mh:evolutionism:Church of Evolution|Church of Evolution]] under which two things are considered essential for success: attention and data, in other words the eye of the church must be looking at the people (data) and the people must be looking back (attention)

==See Also==
* [[influencarchy]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
